libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not require Docker or extra Maven dependencies for core coverage; tests can create a local Vert.x HTTP server and exercise WebClient, BodyCodec, forms, multipart, sessions, caching, redirects, and streaming. Ensure the generated test/build setup applies native runtime system properties for 5.0.1 on Java 25: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient APIs reference the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 module; avoid targeting OAuth2-specific coverage unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
The Unix-domain-socket Docker-daemon example in the documentation is an advanced use case, not required for meaningful Web Client coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is normally usable with only the tested artifact and local HTTP endpoints, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x and needs the same Java 25 native runtime unsafe-access flags already used for 5.0.0.
